title: 15 — Decisions Log
summary: Lightweight ADR-style log capturing 20 accepted planning decisions covering stack, auth, multi-tenancy, Discord bot, RCON, hosting, and data model choices.
notes: Multi-entry ADR log: 20 separate decisions (D-001 through D-020), each with Status: Accepted. Treated as a single ADR-class artifact since every entry follows ADR structure (Decision/Rationale/Trade-offs) and all are Accepted. Synthesizer should split entries by D-### heading.
